scripts.ci: yarn biome ci . && yarn workspace @gopay-internal/core run typecheck && yarn workspace @gopaycz/gopay-js-sdk run typecheck && yarn workspace @gopaycz/gopay-js-sdk run check:circular && yarn workspace @gopaycz/gopay-js-sdk run check:exports && yarn workspace @gopaycz/gopay-js-sdk-browser run typecheck && yarn workspace @gopaycz/gopay-js-sdk-browser run check:circular && yarn workspace @gopaycz/gopay-js-sdk-browser run check:exports
scripts.example: yarn workspace @gopaycz/gopay-js-sdk run build && yarn workspace gopay-js-sdk-example run dev
scripts.docker: yarn docker:clean && yarn docker:build && yarn docker:start
scripts.docker:clean: docker ps -aq --filter ancestor=gopay-js-sdk:latest | grep . | xargs docker rm -f || true
scripts.docker:start: docker run --name gopay-js-sdk -e GP_DEBUG=true --env-file sdk/.env -p 8080:8080 gopay-js-sdk:latest
